description_long: This is an upright, arched gravestone made of weathered gray stone, set into a small patch of grass. The front face features a relief carving of a steam locomotive at the top, followed by several lines of engraved text, though much of the inscription is worn and difficult to read. The back of the gravestone displays a carved motif of two clasped hands within a circular border, with additional engraved text below. The stone is relatively thin and rectangular in profile, with a rounded top and flat sides. Moss and discoloration are visible on the surface, indicating age and exposure to the elements. The gravestone stands alone, with no visible attachments or additional grave markers nearby.
description: A weathered, arched gray stone gravestone with a carved steam locomotive and worn inscriptions, set in a patch of grass.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched gravestone with a steam locomotive relief and engraved text.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin, upright profile of the gravestone and grassy base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a carved motif of clasped hands and additional inscriptions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the stone's thickness and grassy foundation.
